sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n66813" key="metanaieta/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μεταναιετ-άω</orth>, <sense id="n66813.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dwell with</tr_>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">τισι</itype> to be read metri gr. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μεταναίεται</foreign> in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0013.tlg002.perseus-grc1:87" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">h.Cer.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">87</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
